message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "Cliente" as C1 #D3E5F8#042C69 {
}
participant "Servidor de Autorización\n(Authorization Server)" as S1 #FFCCCB##B71C1C{
  note right of S1 : Autenticación del Usuario Final \n - Nombre de usuario y contraseña \n u otros métodos como MFA o federados 
}

== Fase 1: Redirección ==
activate C1
note over C1,S1:#FFFFFF;Redirecciona al cliente con el scope openid para solicitar autenticacion OIDC. El servidor responde redirigiendo la solicitud a su endpoint /authorize.\nCódigo HTTP Status Code = 302 Found\ntext/html;charset=UTF-8 Location=https://auth-server.com/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=my-client-id&redirect_uri=http%3A//my-app/callback-url/&scope=openid+profile+email&state=random-state-value-to-prevent-CSRF-attacks-and-replay-of-old-authentication-responses-by-malicious-parties-using-the-same-browser-session-as-another-user's-or-device-without-permission-from-that-other-party/device-owner/account-holder/user-agent/etcetera... ;font color black;font size 12;text align left;line thickness .5px;border.dashed;color grey;backgroundColor white;;end note


deactivate C1 

S1 ->> C1 : Redirect to Authorization Endpoint (/authorize) + parameters including response type 'id_token' or hybrid flow if needed along wih other required params like client ID , redirect URI etc..  

group Authentication Process at AuthzServer side  
    activate S1    
        alt User already logged in ?        
            yes --> noLoginNeededLabel <<implicit>>            
                deactivate S1                
                 return ......          
             else                 
                  -
